name: Stickman Crazy Box
author: Poki
description: Stickman Crazy Box is a fantastic collection of 20 thrilling action games! You can choose from quick game or tournament mode. It is guaranteed that you will never get bored! With the option to unlock various skins and accessories, the more you play, the cooler it gets! But what's truly exciting is that you can enjoy it with friends - up to 4 players can join in for shared fun. Are you ready for some crazy fun gaming adventures? How to play Stickman Crazy Box ? Player 1: WASD to move Player 2: Arrow Keys to move Player 3: IJKL to move Player 4: TFGH to move Who created Stickman Crazy Box? Stickman Crazy Box is created by Art Industries. Play their other games on Poki: Stickman Parkour Skyland and Stickman Parkour 2: Lucky Block ! How can I play Stickman Crazy Box for free? You can play Stickman Crazy Box for free on Poki. Can I play Stickman Crazy Box on mobile devices and desktop? Stickman Crazy Box can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Stickman Crazy Box with my friend? Yes! Stickman Crazy Box is a single or local multiplayer game so you can play with your friend at the same computer!
